Which city do you like most?

How much did you spend? ˉ III. 綜合測驗:以下兩篇短文,共有 15 個空格,為第 26 至 40 題,每題有四個 選項,請依各篇短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ˉ ▲ 下篇短文共有 7 個空格,為第 26 – 32 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格 的答案。 僅供參考 Distracted walking, like distracted driving, is now a cause of injuries and fatalities. A recent study shows that more and more people ended up in the hospital 26 walking while using their phones. In the United States, the number of people who 27 seriously doubled from 2004 to 2010. It also found that 28 who were guilty of distracted walking were much less likely to look before crossing streets or obey traffic signals. The problem may be caused by misguided ideas of multi-tasking. Many people think that they are able to function effectively when they are texting 29 they are walking. 30, the fact is that each task has to be given full attention. There are several 31 solutions. One way is to teach children safe texting, and 32 is to punish distracted walking. These are just some of the means of improving road safety. ˉ
questions.explanation: 正解：(C)；來源：103四技二專英文科答案.pdf

Because they can design more interesting games. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文

To give them a computer that cannot play video games.

questions.subject: 英文

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the purpose of food banks?

To provide goods for free to people in financial need.

To get rid of unwanted goods and foods. 公告試題 ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: How is the supermarket-like food bank different from other food banks?

It allows recipients to choose what they need.
It receives help from the government.
It holds activities for special holidays. ˉ
questions.explanation: 正解：(B)；來源：103四技二專英文科答案.pdf

questions.explanation: 正解：(D)；來源：103四技二專英文科答案.pdf
